hooks.command: dir="$(pwd)"; hash="$(echo -n "$dir" | md5sum 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-32 || echo -n "$dir" | md5)"; pidfile="/tmp/jcmwatch-${hash}.pid"; if [ -f "$pidfile" ]; then pid=$(awk '{print $1}' "$pidfile"); stored_start=$(cut -d' ' -f2- "$pidfile"); actual_start=$(ps -p "$pid" -o lstart= 2>/dev/null | tr -s ' ' || ps -p "$pid" -o start= 2>/dev/null | tr -s ' ' || echo ''); if [ "$stored_start" = "$actual_start" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "jcodemunch is available and the code watcher is running — index is kept current automatically. Use resolve_repo, search_symbols, get_file_outline, find_references, get_context_bundle for code exploration."}'; else echo '{"systemMessage": "jcodemunch is available. Use resolve_repo, search_symbols, get_file_outline, find_references, get_context_bundle — NOT Grep/Read — for code exploration. the code watcher is NOT running; run `roborepo index code` if the index may be stale."}'; fi; else echo '{"systemMessage": "jcodemunch is available. Use resolve_repo, search_symbols, get_file_outline, find_references, get_context_bundle — NOT Grep/Read — for code exploration. the code watcher is NOT running; run `roborepo index code` if the index may be stale."}'; fi

if [ -d "$(pwd)/docs" ]; then if [ -f "$(pwd)/docs/.jdm-indexed" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "jdocmunch is available and docs are indexed. Use search_sections, get_toc, get_section for doc exploration instead of Read."}'; else echo '{"systemMessage": "jdocmunch: docs/ exists but is not indexed. Run: roborepo index docs docs/"}'; fi; fi
echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Grep and Glob are blocked. Use jcodemunch tools instead: search_symbols, get_file_outline, find_references, or get_context_bundle."}'
